expectations.text: 报告包含 SSRF 漏洞发现（用户可控 URL 被直接请求）
expectations.evidence: Finding #3: SSRF across 4 methods at lines 17-55

expectations.text: 报告包含硬编码认证 Token 发现
expectations.evidence: Finding #2: Hardcoded JWT Bearer Token at line 8

expectations.text: 报告包含 XXE/XML 外部实体注入漏洞发现
expectations.evidence: Finding #5: XXE / Billion Laughs at lines 34-40

expectations.text: 报告包含敏感信息泄露发现（print 输出 token）
expectations.evidence: Finding #4: Sensitive Token in Logs at line 30

expectations.text: 报告包含代码注入漏洞发现（exec() 执行远程下载代码）
expectations.evidence: Finding #1: RCE via exec() at lines 49-55

expectations.text: 报告包含不安全的文件写入发现（upload_file 路径由 URL 决定）
expectations.evidence: upload_file() is mentioned under SSRF but not flagged as a distinct insecure file write vulnerability

expectations.text: 每个漏洞发现都包含具体的文件名和行号
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes specific line numbers in summary table

expectations.text: 每个漏洞发现都包含修复建议
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes detailed remediation code

expectations.text: 报告包含安全评分或安全评级
expectations.evidence: No numerical score/100 or A-F grade. Has 'Critical' risk level but no formal scoring system
